Event: Magic Training - Flying Hedgehog
Event Date: 23/12/2024
Sage Bot Item Code: AM71
Flying Hedgehog Tamer Amulet

Once in a while, when the unit's health drops below 40%, they freeze 2 random enemies for 3 sec. Frozen units cannot move or attack, and the cooldown time of their gear and artifact abilities is increased by 3 sec. Also, the unit restores 150000 health to themself and casts restoration on a random ally every second for 3 sec. The unit removes a random debuff and restores 150000 health. Also, the unit's damage is increased by 30% and health by 25% for 3 sec.

Requirements: 98-100

User rating: 🌝🌝🌝🌝🌝

Event: Magic Training - Flying Hedgehog

Event date: 23/12/2024

Sage bot code: AM71

First trigger: 4 sec

Cooldown: 8 secs
